text:
HUSTLERS 2:
Kevin Hart and the Rock are just two struggling small town strippers. until one day, they run into Bill Cosby. Cosby then introduces them to the wild, wacky world of drugging bitches and taking advantage of them. They laugh, they cry, and they learn some important life lessons along the way. If you loved HUSTLERS 1 you should be more than willing to tolerate HUSTLER 2!🎬

EDIT: Also, make the women wealthy business owners so everyone forgets that it's still an awful crime.
